## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested in latest Chrome and Firefox
- [ ] Keyboard navigation still works (Tab / Arrows / Enter / Delete)
- [ ] Save and Load round-trip verified with `.hmap.json`
- [ ] No new external network requests
- [ ] File format `version` bumped if schema changed (with migrator)
- [ ] Screenshots / GIF attached for UI changes
